name: Betesan
message: Betesan is a leading engineering company established in 1992 in Tuzla, specializing in ship electrical contracting and supply of electrical materials. The company offers innovative and high-quality solutions in ship power and automation systems, electrical panels, and control consoles, catering to the maritime and industrial sectors. Betesan also provides tailored solutions for military maritime needs, energy transmission, and processing industries, ensuring reliability and efficiency. With over 30 years of experience, Betesan serves a diverse clientele, including ship owners and operators, industrial facilities, and military forces.
